source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/CE 현장심사 일정표 및 부적합 사항/■ 심사 대응 자료/(A-TCF-5-019-001) Bolt 사양 변경 건_2020.03.25/(A-TCF-5-019-001) Bolt 사양 변경 건_2020.03.25/첨부파일/HAD1717MC, MG_BOM_Rev.0.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM part list for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG Retrofit Detector configurations and accessories.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product configuration and component traceability for HAD1717MC/MG detector, power box, packaging, accessory, label, and manual items.
keyPoints: HAD1717MC is listed as a Retrofit Detector with Type CsI Type.
HAD1717MG is listed as a Retrofit Detector with Type GDX Type.
Both product structures include Detector, Power Box, packaging, CD, CD case, and ShockWatch items.
Accessory options include LAN CAT6 cable, AC cable variants by country/region, trigger cable, main data cables, labels, packing labels, and Korean/English manuals.
The BOM includes ERP codes, part names, part categories, drawing numbers, revision numbers, specifications, suppliers, units, and quantities.

evidence.claim: The document is a part list for HAD1717MC.
The document is a part list for HAD1717MG.
HAD1717MC is categorized as a Retrofit Detector.
HAD1717MC is identified as CsI Type.
HAD1717MG is identified as GDX Type.
HAD1717MC includes a Detector assembly identified as HAD1717MC OQC Module Ass'y.
HAD1717MG includes a Detector assembly identified as HAD1717MG OQC Module Ass'y.
The CsI panel module includes TFT Panel_17X17, CsI, TI, Sealant, Read out IC, Gate IC, reflect sheets, and adhesive items.
evidence.evidenceText: AR-A7-1001,1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI ... TFT Panel_17X17 ... CsI ... TI ... Sealant (Side Seal) ... Read out IC_43 ... Gate IC ... Reflect Sheet ... Adhesive

evidence.claim: The GDX/Gods panel module includes a 1717 TFT Panel, 1717 Gods, OCA_17x17, Read out IC, Gate IC, and adhesive items.
evidence.evidenceText: AR-A7-2301,1717 PANEL MODULE_Gods ... 1717 TFT Panel ... 1717 Gods ... OCA_17x17 ... Read out IC_43 ... Gate IC ... Adhesive

evidence.claim: The power box includes POWER BOX BOARD, SMPS, AC power cable, DC power cable, cover hardware, and fastening screws.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-B-0-01,POWER BOX,Ass'y ... POWER BOX BOARD ... RPS-200-12,SMPS ... POWER CABLE (AC-FILTER/Schurter:DD12.6321.111) ... POWER CABLE (DC)

evidence.claim: Accessory options include AC cable variants for Korea, United States, Japan, Brazil, and Korea/Europe.
evidence.evidenceText: AC Cable (220V) / 한국 ... AC Cable (110V) / 미국 ... AC Cable (110V) / 일본 ... AC Cable (220V) / 브라질 ... AC Cable (220V) / 한국, 유럽

evidence.claim: Product labels and packing labels are listed for domestic, US, and Europe destinations.
Korean and English manuals are listed for HAD1717MC/MG.
evidence.evidenceText: HAD1717MC/MG 제품 국문 Manual ... HAD1717MC/MG 제품 영문 Manual

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Document date is not reliably stated. The table shows month/day entries such as 04월 22일 and slash placeholders, but no year is present in the document text.
The source is a preprocessed spreadsheet-style table with repeated HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG part lists and noisy comma-separated layout.
Standards are not stated in the source text.
Some evidence appears conflicting or repeated across revisions/assemblies, including alternate panel module codes and supplier spellings such as 휴캠 and 휴켐.
